Silver Bracelet of Speed  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WRIST
AC: 38
STR: +10 STA: +10 WIS: +10 INT: +10 HP: +100 ENDUR: +100
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Silver Bracelet of Speed
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WRIST
AC: 38
STR: +10 STA: +10 WIS: +10 INT: +10 HP: +100 ENDUR: +100
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Hoss
Lucy Entry By:Suladan
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-13 00:06:51
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Test of the Platinum Tear

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded November 20th, 2022 by halfridge

Post Comment
Monk only bracer
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2016 at 9:58 AM Rating: Decent
Madcapper03
Scholar
24 posts
This is a monk only bracer. There is no value in any other class getting this before them.
▲ Page top
Quest = it goes to whoever did the quest dorks
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2004 at 7:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772345232
139 posts
I dont get people who think that this item is better for a particular class over another. Good grief, its a QUEST. The person who does the quest gets the item. It doesn't matter of they are not the ideal class. Fact is THEY did the quest, not you. The tears and symbols are used in many quests so you can default them to any particular class anyway. Come on people, use your brains before you post.


Edited, Tue Sep 7 20:57:26 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Quest = it goes to whoever did the quest dorks
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2004 at 5:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1696810595756
402 posts
That is true that any class can use it, but it does favor melee and hybrids over casters. For one, it doesn't have raw mana, just 100+ hitpoints. It also has a 41% haste that makes it more efficent for melee and hybrids to get more use out of it (for instance, faster swings to keep taunt on a mob and away from a caster). The only kind of caster I've noticed that really melees a lot is a cleric. There are much better bracers for casters too which have raw mana and better resists.

Edited, Mon Sep 27 03:44:57 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Quest = it goes to whoever did the quest dorks
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2004 at 11:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763513597
3 posts
perhaps.. but i and others can use haste while fear kiting... mmmmmm kill it before fear wears off thus.. haste.

good quest item as most casters "arn't elegable" for haste items otherwise in groups.

RE: Quest = it goes to whoever did the quest dorks
QuoteReply

__DEL__1591779109711
934 posts
perhaps...but think for the good of the Raid/Guild...not you while your soloing

QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2004 at 7:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760794287
80 posts

As for Casters bidding on haste items, it should be like it usually is, If none of the melee's need it then they can have a shot at it.

Alternatly The Silver charm of tranquility would prolly better for a caster at this stage of the game. It has no Int/Wis but it does have better saves and 100 mana which is better for those w/ maxed wis/int.

Tal,

My main is a druid but I have a 62 monk and 63 chanter. QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2003 at 5:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794088760
13 posts
All/All, i would not limit this to any class. If i can i will get this. My sham would love to have a haste item to be added to my castable haste. I am sure every class would like haste. I am sick of people saying items belong to blah blah when it says All All. If a druid wants to go thru the quest then grats him.
▲ Page top
RE: pally/sk
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2004 at 5:00 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592261140033
12 posts
Sorry I had to comment on this. Yes I agreee ALL/ALL means what it says. And I'm not saying it belongs to the Melee Class as much as a Ceramic Totem of Xegony belongs to a Caster :-). But the facts are that a Melee Class would make a lot more sense to use this item then a Caster Class. Just like a Ceramic Totem of Xegony would make a lot more sense if a Caster Class had first pick on it :-). (Even if its tailor made hehehe) The roles of the game is plain and simple. At higher lvls what Shaman in his right mind would want to Tank. I said Tank because that is what a Haste item is intended for. It was made to enhance a Weapons effectiveness in a Melee Combat. I'm not saying something is wrong with a Shaman getting Haste. I'm just saying at this lvl why would you want to bother getting a Haste Item when you would actually be assisting the Group by Slowing and Dot's? (Spell Casting, Not Melee) Honestly how many times will you ever Melle at this lvl. You would get slaughtered... I know of this cause I was trying to do this with my Druid...LOL

Doz is a joke
QuoteReply
# Dec 06 2002 at 8:50 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764142082
23 posts
The hardest part about Doz is catching him up, there are stacks of guilds on bristlebane that are HoT capable and able to kill doz, so when he pops, he rapidly drops. If you think this guys is tough, wait till you try Master of the Guard, or the Progenitor in ST. Laf, then you'll see tough.
Or half the named in Vex Thal, talk about endurance battles. This guy USED to be tough, pre luclin, but with aa skills like combat stability and combat agility, he's a pushover. P.S. Also a tip, your MT can be out of lineof sight of your CH chain clerics........
▲ Page top

Without a doubt the single best post there.
My guild just got ToV-enabled. Many are thinking "big deal" but we only have about 15 players on at any one time. We had two wipes, an add and someone opened the door but got two armor pieces and a lot of confidence. Not ready for the Wicked guy for a while but all armor will help in the long run.

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 17 2002 at 2:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) okay this is in fact going to get the most use out of a pally or an sk. every stat is being used the most for those classes. monk this item is awesome because its weightless. whoever posted about items like this and people should shut up about class only. stop making an *** of yourself.
Heh
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2002 at 11:50 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758703851
89 posts
This item is SOOOO a shadowknight/pally bracer! omg omg! it has 10 int/wis! holy jesus! it's soooo a pally/sk bracer!
/sarcasm off
I really really hate people who poste 'This should go to this class-type only' crap, it's moronic and narrow sighted.
Unless you're a guildleader of a guild capable of doing this quest you shouldn't even freakin care about it. Most of the people posting things like that are mid 40's gawking at a 38ac item and thinking it drops off an orc pawn in some zone they've never heard of and feel the right to say who should get it.
So stop it and post info about the item, not who should get it.
btw, got a black symbol for this off of Casalena or something close to that in HoT today.

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 12 2002 at 5:44 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I dont know how many of you ae on a PvP server, and how many of you have ever plaed a monk, but this itemis made specifically for a monk. An item with 38! ac, huge stats and resists, 0.0 weight, ohh and BTW HASTE!!!!! This peice is monk, and monk only. LOL i dont care that is has Int, or Wiz. Who the fdhf cares! I will have one soon :P

can this be MQ'd?
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2002 at 1:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780724382
2 posts
Hey all, was wondering if anyone knows for sure if this item can be multi-quested or not. I have an old character that has 3 out of the 4 items, only need the runed symbol. But I am now playing a new character which i like so much more.

Given that the quest mob is left alive long enough to turn in the items, can i just have the old char give 3 of the items to mob, then have my new char give the 4th and final item?

Thanks for any help
▲ Page top
RE: can this be MQ'd?
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2002 at 5:23 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758718885
7 posts
Yes, they can be multiquested, but both characters need ally faction to CoV.
I was looting some symbols on our first HoT runs because noone knew what they were for and multiquested 2 of them with clerics in my guild for buckler of insight.
Worked like a charm.
Just waiting on Lendidiara to spawn to get my own silver bracelet of speed.

Gnomb Goodbasher
level 60 warlord
<Divine Legend>
Terris Thule

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 28 2002 at 1:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I know yall think that a Hast Item should only go to Melee classes but I have news for you Your Clerics could sure use the hit points and HP to help stay alive while healing yall. This may seem unimportant to some that just laugh when a cleric dies but try to get a rez or a better heal and you will not find one. Keep the mobs off the cleric is the name of the game even if it cost the melee his own life out there. The Clerics give unselfishly and usually do not get much in return. They cast Symbol which costs them and usually do not loot much because they are busy medding to keep others going. Give them a break

Priests can shoot for the Shield of Holy Vigor. It's a really nice priest-only shield with 41% haste. Drops in ssra.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 28 2002 at 3:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No preist class will ever have this, and if they do it is a totall waste. 41 percent haste is currently the best in the game...
RE: Silver Bracelet of Speed
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2002 at 3:03 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592758718885
7 posts
I usually dont post here, but some people really need to read before posting here.
This item doesnt drop, it is the result of a quest.
My guild has 2 people ready for this quest (aside from the platinum tear) and it is very likely only one will get the item before guild progression will make it unlikely we will hit Dozekar again (after hunting in ToV for 4+ months).
The 3 symbols are drops off named wyverns in the Halls of Testing in Temple of Veeshan (3 day respawn).
The platinum tear needed drops off Dozekar the Cursed, a 7 day spawn in Halls of testing and is one of the rare tears he can drop (he drops between 2 and 4 tears out of ~12).
So you first need a guild capable of taking out Dozekar (hits for up to 900-quadding, has a 400 point unresistable AoE every 10 seconds that also strips your top buff) and you have to find him up (you can bet your guild is not the only one looking for him).
Second little detail is the necessary faction.
You need to be ally to Claws of Veeshan to complete the quest.
Most guilds who are capable of taking out Dozekar move to giant faction soon after and start killing mobs in West ToV which seriously hurts your CoV faction.
And third and probably most annoying detail is the fact that the quest mob for turn in sits in West ToV and is usually killed within 2 hours after spawning (Lenindara the Keeper).

And yes i am only a platinum tear away from completing the quest and we only have our warriors(primary) and other melees(secondary) on the list for the quest as all our raiding rangers and rogues have their epic and the most important detail of this item is the 41 percent haste.

Gnomb Goodbasher
level 60 Troll Warlord
Divine Legend - Terris Thule
▲ Page top
RE: Silver Bracelet of Speed
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2002 at 7:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592791513703
View User Forum
Scholar
229 posts
Haste definatly helps melee keep mobs off clerics.

Sure it is nice for a clerice, but at 41% haste I cant really see clerics getting one, at lest not high on the list. If a cleric pulls agro on encountes on the level required to get this, chances are they wont live anyway.

This is raid loot, and how clerics uses peridots and loots in groups is not really relevant.

This bracer kicks *** for anyone who can use it, but I am pretty sure tanks and pullers are first in line.
